In India, a design system's success is measured by how well it renders on a ₹10,000 phone on a 3G network. – Rajat Patel, Design Systems Lead, Zepto.
Simplicity isn't just a design choice; it's our DNA. We build software that just works without expensive training. – Sridhar Vembu, Founder/CEO, Zoho (Advocate for self-hosted, clean UI).
Micro-interactions are a luxury. In quick commerce, the only interaction that matters is the one that gets the 'Order Placed' screen in 10 seconds. – Chirag Narula, UX Engineer, Blinkit.
We use AI to flesh out the details, but the structure of the UI must remain the responsibility of the human engineer. – Shailesh Kumar, Engineering Lead, Zoho.
Designing for India means solving for the 'cognitive load' of a user who might be using their first-ever smartphone. – Khushboo Verma, Software Engineer (UI), Microsoft India.
Speed of execution is a UX feature. If the engineer can't build it in a day using our Design System, the system is too complex. – Product Design Team, Blinkit (Bolt Design System).
Building for Bharat means your Next.js app must be functional even when the JavaScript fails to hydrate. – Ajeet Singh Raina, Docker Captain & Indian DevOps Lead.
Don't fall in love with your UI; fall in love with the problem of a delivery partner trying to find a gate in a monsoon. – Swiggy Engineering Blog.
Our 'Bolt' system isn't just a Figma library; it's a React 'Lego' set that helps us ship features before the competition. – Design Engineer, Blinkit.
Accessibility in the Indian context includes language, literacy, and 'Hinglish' support in the UI copy. – Senior UI Engineer, Freshworks.
Clean, approachable looks build trust. In B2B SaaS, if the UI feels cluttered, the user feels the product is unreliable. – Srinivasan Raghavan, Freshworks Engineering.
The triangle of effective design: User-centric, business-aligned, and technically feasible for a 2-week sprint. – Rajat Patel, Zepto.
In a city like Bangalore, we perform 1 million computations per second just to show 'nearby' restaurants; the UI must reflect that complexity simply. – Dale Vaz, former CTO, Swiggy.
India's talent is as good as the US, but our constraints—like variable data speeds—make us better engineers. – Aadit Palicha, CEO/Coder, Zepto.
Write before you sketch. A good UX engineer is first a good UX copywriter. – UX Lead, Blinkit.
Design elitism has no place in a startup. If you can't open the code and fix a CSS bug, you're slowing us down. – Rajat Patel, Design Systems Lead, Zepto.
Our UI must scale from 100k to 300k RPM during lunch hours without breaking the customer's home page. – Swiggy Infrastructure & UI Team.
Self-taught designers who learn by doing bring a 'hacker' energy to UI that formal education often misses. – Girish Mathrubootham, Founder, Freshworks.
Tailwind CSS is a godsend for Indian startups because it standardizes the UI without the overhead of a custom CSS-in-JS library. – Fullstack Lead, Razorpay.
The 'Veg/Non-Veg' toggle in Indian apps is a masterclass in localized UX—simple, high-impact, and culturally vital. – UI Lead, Zomato.
If the UI isn't 'Uncomplicated,' it's not Freshworks. – Design Team, Freshworks (Dew Design System).
Building once and enabling broad reuse is how we launched Uber Direct and Reserve on the same foundation. – Madan Thangavelu, Engineering Lead, Uber India.
Contentment in tech comes from building tools that serve people in rural areas, not just the Tier-1 cities. – Sridhar Vembu, Zoho.
Quick commerce UI is about reducing 'time-to-cart'—every extra tap is a potential drop-off. – Engineering Manager, Zepto.
A design system is a living system that evolves, breaks, and gets patched. It is never 'done'. – CTO, Zoho Corp.
Your design tokens should be the 'Single Source of Truth' between your React code and your mobile app. – Lead Design Engineer, PhonePe.
The best way to learn UI engineering is to reverse-engineer the apps you use every day in India. – Rajat Patel, Zepto.
Performance is the most important UI element for an app used in a moving auto-rickshaw. – Mobile Lead, Ola Cabs.
Payload CMS and Next.js allow us to build 'local-first' apps that handle the patchy internet of Rajasthan perfectly. – Tech Lead, Indian SaaS Startup.
The future of Indian UI is 'AI-assisted, human-verified.' We ship faster, but we own the correctness. – Sridhar Vembu, Zoho.
